summary: Candid handheld footage of Trump on the South Lawn greeting a group of teenagers in 'Presidential Fitness Test' shirts and doing his 'Trump dance' with them, with a song playing over the clip. While it has youth appeal and a music track, it is a single continuous recording of a real event with no cinematic cutting, titles, color grading, or genre construction (the keyframes are one progressive scene, not a montage). It reads as a lightly-edited candid event clip rather than a produced music video or genre experiment, so it falls out of scope.
notable_text: Tweet: 'SPOTTED: PRESIDENT TRUMP TEACHING THE TRUMP DANCE ON THE SOUTH LAWN'
Audio lyric: 'You're gonna need something out of your head'
